title: Inside India newsletter: India's $50 billion worth of IPOs at risk as Trump ends Iran ceasefire
summary_full: After a slow start this year, IPOs worth $50 billion were ready to hit Indian markets. These plans are at risk after the U.S. ended the ceasefire with Iran.
summary_public: After a slow start this year, IPOs worth $50 billion were ready to hit Indian markets. These plans are at risk after the U.S. ended the ceasefire with Iran.

IR.label: negative
